home_intro: This site's data lives in a hand-curated Obsidian wiki, which is the source of truth. Red Panda Finder and the redpanda-lineage project served as initial references, supplemented by zoos' public information.
photos_note: Photos are embedded from fans' public Instagram posts; copyright belongs to each author. Tap to open the original post.
tree_hint: Drag to pan, pinch or scroll to zoom; tap a node to open that panda
zoos_intro: All markers use public coordinates. Click a marker or card to see current residents.
feedback_title: Report a missing panda or zoo
feedback_intro: Is there a red panda or a zoo the directory doesn't have yet? Tell us here. Please include the name (panda or zoo) and a Red Panda Finder or official zoo-site link. Every report is verified by the author before anything is added. Thanks!
feedback_setup: The report form is being set up — please check back soon.
feedback_hub_intro: Thanks for helping make the directory more complete and more useful. Start from the form's "type" dropdown below: report a missing panda or zoo, share other suggestions and feedback, or drop a request in the wishlist. Every report is reviewed by the author before anything is acted on.
report_error: Report info or an update on this page
footer_note: Auto-generated from a hand-curated Obsidian wiki (initial reference: Red Panda Finder & redpanda-lineage)
feedback_footer_link: Report a problem or missing panda/zoo
thanks_intro: This directory keeps growing thanks to the many fans who help report missing pandas, zoos, and updates. Here are the friends who've helped — thank you! (Listed with their consent to be credited publicly.)
thanks_empty: Names will start appearing here soon. Help out through the report form and your name will show up here.
